name: RangeSlider
description: A range slider input for selecting a numeric range between min and max values.

marks.description: Array of {value, label} for scale marks.

keyboardNavigation.description: Increases active thumb value by step.
Decreases active thumb value by step.
Sets active thumb to minimum allowable value.
Sets active thumb to maximum allowable value.

aria.aria-valuenow: Current value of the focused thumb.
aria.aria-valuemin: Minimum value of the focused thumb.
aria.aria-valuemax: Maximum value of the focused thumb.
